examples: The orbit of this comet intersects the orbit of the Earth.
We were not altogether sure that the comet would miss the Earth.
The comet is going to come back in 2061 and we are all going to be able to see it. Well, our offspring are, anyway.
The Air Comet co-pilot and a passenger aboard the same flight also saw the light.
Who knew when this low-budget comet would return to this corner of the galaxy?
